programme.title: South Park: Eek, a Penis!
programme.desc: While Ms. Garrison is off trying to find a way to become the man he was always intended to be, Cartman is put in charge of the classroom.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: September 23, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings
programme.desc: The boys of South Park produce their own morning news show on the school's closed-circuit television station and are immediately caught up in an intense competition for ratings.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Joins NAMBLA
programme.desc: Cartman suddenly finds Stan, Kenny and Kyle too immature to be his friends. He then decides to seek friendship using the Internet, where he finds an older man who is more than willing to be his 'friend.'

programme.title: South Park: Super Fun Time

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina

programme.desc: A botched murder investigation with faulty evidence is revealed after the body of a woman, believed to have been a murder victim of a death-row killer three years before, shows up in the morgue.

programme.title: The Closer: Standards and Practices
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer is murdered; an anonymous complaint for 'conduct unbecoming' is filed against Brenda.

programme.title: The Closer: Blue Blood
programme.desc: When an LA cop turns up dead, Brenda and her team race against the clock to get the truth. The relationship between Fritz and Brenda elevates to a whole new level.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Jane and the team investigate what appears to be a modern-day witch hunt in Salem. Meanwhile, Frankie's old girlfriend returns to town with a surprise and Jane has no problem speaking her mind about the problem.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: My Own Worst Enemy
programme.desc: Jane and Maura delve into a family's background when a man is killed in what appears to be a mugging gone wrong. Meanwhile, a romantic and mysterious figure from Maura's past shows up, causing a rift when Jane suspects Maura is hiding something.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Gone Daddy Gone
programme.desc: When a young, female dockworker is found dead, the team discovers that the dock has mob connections that may lead to Maura's biological father. Meanwhile, Jane tries to evade sensitivity training and Maura starts spending time with Jane's brother.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: What a Difference a Day Makes
programme.desc: As Meredith, Derek and all of their friends prepare for the big wedding, a group of college students are admitted after being injured in a car crash on their way to their graduation ceremony. Meanwhile, Izzie fears the worst.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Here's to Future Days/ Now or Never
programme.desc: After spending time with a fellow cancer patient, Izzie contemplates whether or not to move forward with a risky surgery. George delivers some stunning news that sends shockwaves through the hospital, while Bailey is accepted into the fellowship program.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Here's to Future Days/ Now or Never
programme.desc: After spending time with a fellow cancer patient, Izzie contemplates whether or not to move forward with a risky surgery. George delivers some stunning news that sends shockwaves through the hospital, while Bailey is accepted into the fellowship program.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: Do You Know Where Your Children Are? (Part 1)
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Atlanta Serial Killer: The KKK Connection? (Part 2)
programme.desc: Investigators believe Wayne Williams, a 23-year-old black man, murdered more than two dozen black children and young men in Atlanta. The 40 year-old evidence is re-examined using modern forensics in search of more answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Last Gasp
programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Very Scary People

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Fortune of the Buzzard
programme.desc: Josh Gates takes on the Indian Ocean's punishing waters as he chases the lost treasure of Olivier Levasseur, AKA 'The Buzzard,' rumored to be worth more than a billion dollars.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Captain Kidd's Treasure
programme.desc: Josh retraces the footsteps of the legendary Captain Kidd in the hopes of finding his buried treasure. From the East Coast to the Caribbean, the search takes him to a real pirate shipwreck and to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of Shangri-La
programme.desc: Josh Gates treks high into the Sky Caves of Nepal in search of the origins of the Shangri-La myth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: Sherlock Josh
programme.desc: Josh goes Private Eye as he explores mysteries across the globe with the help of Stranger Things' Matthew Modine, guru Deepak Chopra and the 'Indiana Jones of Art Heists,' Arthur Brand. Josh also learns the tricks of the trade from a real-life PI.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Mother of All Thunderdomes
programme.desc: Exploding balls, a barrage of buckshot and a new adversary making its debut all plague contestants competing for a shot at the $25,000 grand prize. A realtor tries to close the deal and a hospital administrator may need his employee discount.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Hammer Time
programme.desc: A rocket scientist, a social media guru and the Lebron James of Dodgeball compete for one of the final spots in the championship round. Twists and turns on the course abound, including a mighty new weapon that will make even the God of Thunder tremble!

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Siberian Winter
programme.desc: Captain Wild Bill heads to Russia as captain-for-hire. As an Opilio biomass concentrates along the Russian line, the Dutch Harbor fleet must prepare for a winter season far to the north where ice and waves are most severe and rescue is out of range.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Josh Gates Tonight: Sherlock Josh
programme.desc: Josh goes Private Eye as he explores mysteries across the globe with the help of Stranger Things' Matthew Modine, guru Deepak Chopra and the 'Indiana Jones of Art Heists,' Arthur Brand. Josh also learns the tricks of the trade from a real-life PI.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Mother of All Thunderdomes
programme.desc: Exploding balls, a barrage of buckshot and a new adversary making its debut all plague contestants competing for a shot at the $25,000 grand prize. A realtor tries to close the deal and a hospital administrator may need his employee discount.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Hammer Time
programme.desc: A rocket scientist, a social media guru and the Lebron James of Dodgeball compete for one of the final spots in the championship round. Twists and turns on the course abound, including a mighty new weapon that will make even the God of Thunder tremble!

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Harris Bloodline
programme.desc: On the 10th anniversary of Captain Phil Harris' final season on the Bering Sea, Josh Harris makes a personal journey to rediscover what made his father a legend, and embrace the legacy he inherits as Phil's son and co-captain of the Cornelia Marie.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Everything Changes
programme.desc: The Cornelia crew fights to save their gear from sea ice. Jake risks the far north to fill his tanks before his son's birth. Amid news of a looming pandemic, Russian boats mysteriously disappear and captains race to dock before crab prices crash.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out: Ed vs Will Lord
programme.desc: Ed is up against his old bushcraft teacher, Will Lordiin Bashan, central China, and both challengers are without a knife.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Rocky Mountain High
programme.desc: Cody and Joe battle temperatures of negative twenty degrees Fahrenheit in a fight to stay alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Misty Mountain Drop
programme.desc: In a classic wilderness survival scenario, Cody and Joe take on the mountains of Northern California.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No End in Sight
programme.desc: Stranded in a mangrove swamp in Sri Lanka, Joe and Cody escape the crocodile-filled waters only to find themselves in a leech-infested jungle. But this time, distressed elephants interrupt their journey back and they may not get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No End in Sight
programme.desc: Joe comes face-to-face with elephants and is forced off a cliff, Cody masters the ancient fire piston, and they cross a crocodile-infested lake to escape the longest survival scenario in history of 'Dual Survival.'

programme.title: Dual Survival: Deadly Dunes
programme.desc: Marooned in a sea of sand dunes, Joe and Cody traverse the unforgiving desert and trek deep into the mountains of Oman. Threatened by dehydration and heatstroke, their journey shows how nomads have survived for millennia in this hyper-arid land.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Glacial Downfall
programme.desc: On a glacier and clinging to opposite ends of a rope, Joe and Cody face their most challenging rescue scenario ever. The frozen landscape brings Joe and Cody's opposing survival styles to the forefront of this journey.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No Man Is an Island
programme.desc: Joe sets-off on a mission to locate his new partner, who is on an uninhabited island off the coast of Panama. Using his tracking skills, Joe locates Matt Graham and together they face their first survival situation: getting off of a remote Pacific island.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Mayan Mayhem
programme.desc: Trapped in a labyrinth of underground tunnels, Joe and Matt facedown darkness and risk drowning only to emerge on surface and find an inhospitable jungle. Their opposing approaches to survival pit them against one another before bringing them to rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: On the Edge
programme.desc: Lost on a perilous ridgeline, at 15,000 feet above sea level, Joe and Matt are forced to descend slippery cliffs through extreme weather conditions, where altitude sickness and hypothermia threaten, and life-preserving fire eludes them.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Angela's Story
programme.desc: When Angela's family is unable to accompany her on her weight-loss journey to Texas she is unsure what to do. At the last minute, she reaches out to an old flame, Eric, who still has love for her and is willing to make the trip.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: One Ton Family: Part One
programme.desc: After a lifelong struggle with obesity, the three Perrio siblings travel to Houston in a last-chance journey to lose weight.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: One Ton Family: Part Two
programme.desc: With the Perrios struggling with different stages of their weight loss journey, the revelation of a past tragedy explains their resistance to recovery. The siblings must now come together to overcome their fears and forge a path towards a healthy future.

programme.desc: After a lifelong struggle with obesity, the three Perrio siblings travel to Houston in a last-chance journey to lose weight.

programme.desc: The family anxiously wait while Drew undergoes surgery. Chitoka surprises even the doctor when she pushes herself further than ever before. Things take an unexpected turn when Naomi and her boyfriend go on their first dinner date post-surgery.

programme.title: Family by the Ton: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: After years of being bedbound, Chitoka's surgery day is finally here, but her size makes the procedure extremely dangerous. Naomi shares a surprising secret with her friends. At Beverly's birthday party, the cousins reveal their startling transformations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Watteau Is the Word of the Day
programme.desc: Jennifer wants to break out of her taekwondo uniform, but her mom won't let it go. Madison is forced to choose sides when her two moms' opinions collide. Rebecca rides a mechanical shark all the way to the altar.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is a Randy Situation
programme.desc: An indecisive bride has a challenge for Randy, plus, The Hip Hop Medium wants a black dress.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: We Survived a Year ... Barely
programme.desc: Courtney tackles planning the sextuplets' first birthday party, but taking care of six babies threatens to overwhelm her. The Waldrops struggle with a big decision as they realize their house will not accommodate a family of eleven.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Christmas Miracles and Meltdowns
programme.desc: It's Christmas and the first with the sextuplets at home. Courtney and Eric disagree on whether to sell their house and land while trying to continue their family traditions. The boys put their parents to the test when they want to keep a puppy.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates
programme.desc: An insider's look at the most outrageous penny-pinching people around and their inventive ways to save money.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Stephanie/ Larry
programme.desc: Stephanie's cheap behaviour embarrasses her boyfriend, Patrick, who thinks they have plenty of money to spend.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff travels by bike to save on gas, crashes on his friends' couch, and repays their kindness by serving a cringe-worthy meal.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Latte
programme.desc: Misha makes her own chandelier for her casual elegance nuptials, while Felicia lights up her historic 1920s venue with light sabers. There are laughs and cannon fire at Mallory's beachside soirée, and Jenni embraces Seattle with local food and lattes.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and an Awkward Pirate
programme.desc: Christina chooses eclectic entertainment for her reception, hiring a pirate and a German oompah band; Jamie shares the aisle with her dog.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Caught in a Gypsy Love Triangle
programme.desc: A gypsy bride-to-be finds herself caught in a love triangle with two potential suitors and a bridesmaid from hell. A young Romney teen turns her back on tradition to follow her dreams of becoming the first gypsy supermodel.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: You Don't Know Gypsy!
programme.desc: Wannabe Gypsy bride Sabrina must prove herself to the Gypsy community by undergoing a humiliating ancient trial. Traditions and rituals are an integral part of Gypsy life today, and when Gypsies break the code, there's usually hell to pay.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Alfred and Adonis

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Robin and Wayne

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Red and Jalissa

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bidder Loser
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers to help them bury bizarre items, and then they try to cling onto strangers’ cars. The big loser makes enemies at an auction house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2

programme.title: The Misery Index: Send in the Clowns

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trashed
programme.desc: Across Texas, game wardens work day and night to enforce the law. In East Texas, a young woman is served an arrest warrant. A fisherman has no fishing license but plenty of outstanding warrants. Outside Austin, someone illegally dumps a pile of trash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Deadly Conduct
programme.desc: Inman and Eddins assist on a manhunt when a suspect runs a constable off the road. An ordinary fishing check in Navarro County leads Amundson to illegal activity. In Jasper County, game wardens patrol an area after receiving trespassing complaints.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Joining Forces
programme.desc: On the White Mountains, a team of Wardens and the National Guard deploy on a rescue mission to search for a missing hiker. Warden Masucci handles a disgruntled recreational vehicle driver, and a group of Wardens reconnect during a charity softball game.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rider Round Up
programme.desc: Officer Canfield encounters a feisty swimmer, while Officer McKee intervenes when a sleeping bear is spotted in a backyard. Then, the dirt roads turn ugly when Officer Pushee and McKee must join forces to handle a dozen rowdy ATV violators.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Homecoming
programme.desc: The game wardens bring closure at long last to one of the most confounding mysteries in Maine Warden Service history. They later reflect on their years of service.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Joining Forces
programme.desc: On the White Mountains, a team of Wardens and the National Guard deploy on a rescue mission to search for a missing hiker. Warden Masucci handles a disgruntled recreational vehicle driver, and a group of Wardens reconnect during a charity softball game.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Life on the Border
programme.desc: Up in the North Woods along the Canadian border, things are very different. A warden looking for smugglers encounters a drunk driver with a gun, and a suicidal man enters the woods with a shotgun.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Lost and Found
programme.desc: A new class of wardens are being trained to do search and rescues. A hiker vanishes on the Appalachian trail and the wardens lead one of the largest search and rescue operations in Maine's history to find her.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Small Town Troubles
programme.desc: Game wardens are ready for springtime in Texas. Wardens investigate a video of an illegal hunter. A concerned citizen reports a hunter on his property. A fisherman is illegally catching oysters. A game warden smells something fishy going on.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Tanked!: Dwight Howard's Slamming Snake Tank: Supersized

programme.title: Tanked!: This Tank Is Ludacris!
programme.desc: Rapper and actor Ludacris is ready to get Tanked! He wants Brett and Wayde to build him a classy and sophisticated aquarium with lots of exotic fish! It's a race against the clock to get Ludacris his new aquarium.

programme.title: Tanked!: Ty Dolla's Fresh Tank
programme.desc: Hip-hop artist Ty Dolla $ign wants a tank in his house in Long Beach. He calls in Wayde and Brett to construct a huge freshwater tank. Complete with a real rock insert, perfect replicas of Ty's awards, and embedded into a wall.

programme.title: Tanked!: Alyssa's Charmed Tank
programme.desc: Actress, activist, and entrepreneur Alyssa Milano takes some time out her busy schedule to ask Wayde and Brett to make a tank for her family.

programme.title: Tanked!: Extreme Pond Off! Wayde vs. Brett
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett are going head to head on this one. They both want a one of a kind, extreme pond in their backyard. This dynamic duo is keeping everything top secret from each other. Only one family can reign supreme.

programme.title: Tanked!: Brett's Donut Mania Tank
programme.desc: Donut Mania is Brett's newest business venture and they are about to have their grand opening. Wayde and the whole team want to congratulate him with a surprise fish tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Demarcus Cousins and a Snake Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett have two clients who want aquariums in their own backyard! Basketball superstar Demarcus Cousins wants a corner tank for his Las Vegas house. Meanwhile, a Las Vegas pet store wants a tank for both fish and reptiles!

programme.title: Tanked!: Triple Tank Throwdown!
programme.desc: Businessman Brad Jennings is building a new office and wants to top it off with three tanks from ATM.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tracy Morgan's Giant Shark Tank Revealed
programme.desc: Tracy Morgan is still waiting for his shark tank. The pressure is on Wayde and Brett to convert his entire poolhouse into a massive 14,000 gallon aquarium. Winter is approaching and extra care is taken while transporting Tracy's beloved sharks.

programme.desc: When Pamela Vitale is found brutally murdered in her home on a California mountainside, detectives are led down a dark path to a killer hiding in plain sight. But even a sentence of life without parole can't guarantee this killer won't walk free.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Danger Lurks Below
programme.desc: Mike Williams vanishes while duck hunting on a Florida lake, in an apparent accident. Nancy Grace traces how the victim's mother launched a campaign to learn the truth that uncovered a tale of greed, betrayal, murder, and injustice.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: A Deadly Search for Love
programme.desc: When Utah teen Annie Kasprzak is brutally murdered, one solid lead after another evaporates in a haze of rumors and lies. After a suspect is finally in custody, Annie's family fights to make sure this killer's sentencing is just.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood in the Backyard
programme.desc: A mom and her newborn inexplicably vanish from their California home. When blood is discovered in their backyard, a grieving father is scrutinized and investigators race against the clock to bring this mother and child home before it's too late.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deadly Ally
programme.desc: A land developer disappears into the Arizona desert, and a brother sets out to uncover the truth. But when hikers stumble onto a gruesome discovery, investigators quickly realize no one can be trusted when they find themselves in the line of fire.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Dead Girls Don't Talk

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: High-Wire Hell
programme.desc: Working thousands of feet above the California desert, brave engineers and fearless crews perform perilous high-wire acts to keep the hi-tech tramway system operating safely for the hundreds of daily tourists it transports.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Roller Coaster 911
programme.desc: When the world's oldest roller coaster breaks at the worst possible moment, skilled engineers and technicians race against the clock to investigate what went wrong and how to fix it before it's opened to the public.

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Roller Coaster 911
programme.desc: When the world's oldest roller coaster breaks at the worst possible moment, skilled engineers and technicians race against the clock to investigate what went wrong and how to fix it before it's opened to the public.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Hellfire USA

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Chasing Bigfoot
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, and some believe it's Bigfoot. Terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan. Cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano, leaving experts stumped.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Lake of the Dead
programme.desc: Marine scientists discover a gruesome underwater death zone that seems to kill anything that dares to enter. When apocalyptic skies appear during a deadly earthquake in Ecuador, residents fear it's the end of days.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Valentich/ Texas Blue Dogs
programme.desc: A pilot and his light aircraft disappear from the skies above southern Australia in 1978. In Texas, blue-eyed and hunch backed creatures have mutilated livestock since 2004.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Ghost Yacht and Freaky Fires
programme.desc: Three friends disappear from their catamaran off the coast of Queensland. In a Sicilian village, ordinary items spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: The Yeti
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dancing with Death
programme.desc: Wife and mother of three Stephanie Roller Bruner has a wonderful life, so her disappearance days before Thanksgiving leads to a massive search. When information of a secret love triangle comes out, the case takes a drastic turn.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: Mike Dixiano is heartbroken when his wife Angela Dixiano dies from organ failure after a lifelong battle with drugs and alcohol. Friends and family grieve her death, but when investigators can't find a death certificate, her husband comes under scrutiny.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Chaos ensues in Fox Lake, Illinois when an officer is found dead. With a potential cop killer on the loose, the town is on lockdown. But when sordid details of the dead officer's secret life come out, the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: See No Evil: We Never Fight
programme.desc: A family's worst nightmare begins when 23-year-old Christina Morris goes missing while out with friends in Plano, Texas. Police franticly search to find her alive, but it's the discovery of surveillance camera footage that reveals the shocking truth.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Grab and Go
programme.desc: A robber attempts to hold up four young men at gunpoint, but he's in for a surprise when his victims fight back. And then, a man with a shotgun storms into a garage, but is outmatched by an employee who won't back down.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Surprise Attack
programme.desc: An afternoon motorcycle ride turns into a violent road rage incident when a couple is attacked by an angry driver. And then, when a young woman working alone is robbed at knifepoint, she bravely fights back, fending off her assailant.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: A grieving father goes on the attack; Jealous obsession ends in murderous rage; A victim faces her stalker; A prosecutor throws a temper tantrum in court; A hero judge chases prisoners who bolt.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Nose Job Murder
programme.desc: A young lawyer fails to show up for a blind date. He's been shot to death in his apartment. And another woman freely admits she pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Grab and Go
programme.desc: A robber attempts to hold up four young men at gunpoint, but he's in for a surprise when his victims fight back. And then, a man with a shotgun storms into a garage, but is outmatched by an employee who won't back down.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Surprise Attack
programme.desc: An afternoon motorcycle ride turns into a violent road rage incident when a couple is attacked by an angry driver. And then, when a young woman working alone is robbed at knifepoint, she bravely fights back, fending off her assailant.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: A grieving father goes on the attack; Jealous obsession ends in murderous rage; A victim faces her stalker; A prosecutor throws a temper tantrum in court; A hero judge chases prisoners who bolt.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Dying to Be Famous
programme.desc: We take a look back at the murder of Gianni Versace in the summer of 1997. 20 years later, many questions still remain. We investigate the twisting path of the making of serial killer Andrew Cunanan.

programme.title: See No Evil: Run From the Scene
programme.desc: On November 23, 2012, Pennsylvania DJ Ervin Holton is found shot dead on his friend's porch. With no witnesses, investigators spot cameras outside a nearby store Pointing directly at the crime scene.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Dark Water
programme.desc: After 53-year-old Barbara Hefner disappears from her remote Georgia residence, her body is found floating in nearby Folly Lake. On the hunt for her killer, officers uncover a recent inheritance and secret affair before ultimately bringing justice home.

programme.title: Swamp Murders: Double-Crossed
programme.desc: When the body of 20-year-old transgender female CeCe Dove is found floating in a suburban pond 20 miles from her Cleveland home, detectives consider motives personal and primal as they hunt down her ruthless killer.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Driving with the Devil
programme.desc: A car pulls into a Long Island gas station with a mother shot dead in the front seat. Her husband claims a stranger shot her on the highway, but he's foggy on the details.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Defenseless
programme.desc: A car races up to the ER of a Westchester hospital. Carlos Perez-Olivo, the driver, has been shot in his side and his wife, Peggy has been shot in the head. What horror has befallen this couple? The answer will challenge even experienced investigators.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Body in the Glades
programme.desc: 42-year-old Miami mother Raquel Calderin vanishes without a trace on her way home from work in 2012. The investigation will lead detectives deep into a disturbing family picture, and the truth will haunt them for years to come.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ashes to Alibis
programme.desc: Residents of Post Falls, Idaho, are shocked when devoted family man Bo Kirk vanishes, and his truck is found set ablaze. Bo's sister blames their estranged father, until released ATM security footage suggests a co-worker with piercing blue eyes.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Kind Sister
programme.desc: Elizabeth Baune was a pillar of her community until she was stabbed to death in her own home. The rural town of Payette, Idaho is horrified by the tragic death of a teacher, especially since Elizabeth's own good nature may have been behind her death.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Scared Silent
programme.desc: When Marshall Dent goes missing on Christmas Eve, the Native American community of Shawnee, Oklahoma bands together. After weeks of searching, Marshall is found in a shallow grave on sacred ground, leaving authorities scrambling to find the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Nothing Random
programme.desc: An elderly couple in Moscow, Idaho, frantically perform CPR on their young neighbor after a pop of gunfire interrupts their bedtime routine. Investigators follow fresh footprints from the scene, only to learn the killer may already be behind bars.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Grim Reaper
programme.desc: When Linda found out her biological father was her family friend, Greg Scarpa, she was overjoyed. But when the rest of Greg's bloody secrets came out, Linda learned that being part of his family wasn't just dangerous, it was potentially deadly.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother's Secret
programme.desc: Danyall White tells the gripping true story of her brother Richard. Danyall always thought he was a prankster who told stories. But when his stories started getting more and more violent, she slowly realized that her brother was hiding a monstrous secret.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother, The Devil
programme.desc: Wallace Jeffs was raised to believe that his half-brother, Warren, would guide his family to salvation.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Until We Meet Again
programme.desc: When James Henslee realized that he was the police's prime suspect, he couldn't believe it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Spetsnaz
programme.desc: Spetsnaz are Russia's elite fighting force. From counter terrorist strike squads to special operations experts spearheading the Red Army, these ultimate warriors strike hard and fast.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire

programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Banks
programme.desc: Joe Loya is a professional bank robber, addicted to the adrenaline of power. After 13 months of successful robberies, Loya's luck runs out when one robbery goes wrong. It's the latest in bank technology that leads investigators to Loya and ends his spree.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Become a Neo-Nazi
programme.desc: John Ditullio beat a homeless man to death and killed a neighbour who he felt was an enemy of the white race.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Discover the unknown stories of some of the incredible plots, ploys and people behind America's secret weapons during the Cold War, the Vietnam War, and WWII.

programme.desc: Instead of selling the family home, Brett convinces a son and his mother to restore their Victorian home. Brett knows once he restores their house back to its original glory they will never want to leave their family home of nearly 50 years.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Overhaul
programme.desc: It's a Cabin Masters conundrum as Chase and the team are challenged to take a former garage and turn it into a home that will comfortably accommodate six siblings and their seventeen kids.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Twister Camp
programme.desc: A couple needs help to save their mountain camp that was leveled by a tornado. With an emphasis on outdoor entertaining, Chase and the team add an open second floor and the desired finishing touches to the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Outer Banks Overhaul in North Carolina
programme.desc: Audra and Jason have been renting in North Carolina's Outer Banks for years, but they're ready to put their stamp on a house of their own. Their dream renovation includes gutting the kitchen, creating an open floor plan and an updated game room.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Surfside Revive in Texas
programme.desc: A growing family finds a seaside fixer upper in Surfside Beach, Texas.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Washington Coast Charmer
programme.desc: A couple that's looking for a forever home for their family of four finds a charming house that needs a major upgrade in Grays Harbor County, WA.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Backyard Beachside Blowout in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Texas-Sized Renovation On South Padre Island
programme.desc: A couple and their four kids are looking for a vacation retreat on South Padre Island in Texas. After recently renovating a rental property in the area, they've decided they are ready to get their hands dirty again.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet Treats and Savory Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with triple-processed pork belly that's cured, brined and smoked to meaty perfection. In Seattle, tender braised lamb shoulder amps up a traditional breakfast hash.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Extra Meat Please
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Queens, New York, with a burger loaded to the max with beef, ham, bacon and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Giant Meat and Habanero Heat
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with a burger that originated as a late night, off-menu secret and accidentally became the talk of the town. Then, in Seattle, a beer hall serves a mammoth, pretzel-breaded, deep-fried pork shank.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: My Fair Latte
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts off in Chippewa Falls, Wis., at the Northern Wisconsin State Fair. The Wisconsin woods are the inspiration for the loaded Campfire Burger, and the state's famous cheese curds make an appearance in the Hot Chick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzella Queen of the Dessert
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe enjoys German inspired carnival treats at Christkindlmarket Milwaukee. First Noah digs into the Austrian Alpine Daug which packs a cheese-stuffed bratwurst into a hearty roll topped with sauerkraut and potato salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Mangia Meals
programme.desc: We're taking our tongues on a tour of Italy without leaving the States starting with a pizza in New York that's as large as the city's Italian population.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Seafood- Eat Food!

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Grilled

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Food Traditions

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Love for Lobsters in Maine

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog. Then, when Ronnie Anne forgoes a family Halloween tradition for a 'cool' party, she learns 'cool' doesn't always mean 'fun'.

programme.title: The Loud House: April Fools Rules/ Cereal Offender
programme.desc: Every April Fool’s Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patty Caper/ Plankton's Regular
programme.desc: The secret ingredient in the Krabby Patty is stolen; the Chum Bucket gets a new customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe's Untied/ Squid's Day Off
programme.desc: Pat doesn't know how to tie the laces on his new shoes; Mr. Krabs take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg/ Rock a Bye Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes paranoid; Patrick finds a baby clam and decides to rear it as his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fear of a Krabby Patty/ Shell of a Man
programme.desc: SpongeBob develops a fear of Krabby Patties; Mr. Krab molts his shell before a reunion.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally destroy Sandy's air supply, they have to help her find more oxygen.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.desc: SpongeBob slams the door in Squidward's face; Squidward gets surgery and becomes handsome.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Good Neighbors/ Skill Crane
programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thanks But No Thanks/ Troy Story
programme.desc: Inspired by Candace’s book club selection, the boys decide to reenact the Trojan War from “The Illiad,” but with a Phineas and Ferb twist.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheers for Fears /Just Our Luck
programme.desc: When Candace is stumped about what to get Jeremy for his birthday, she reluctantly decides to ask Phineas and Ferb for their help in creating a ride of Jeremy’s life.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.desc: Guilt gets the better of Carrie when she seeks refuge from a blizzard in a church.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Catching Hell
programme.desc: While at a Mets game, Doug spills mayonnaise on one of Carrie's most important clients.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Carrie is upset with Doug when she learns that a free TV was the reason for their getaway.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buy Curious
programme.desc: When their neighbour dies, Carrie decides it's time for them to enter the real estate game.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pole Lox
programme.desc: At Doug's encouragement, Carrie reluctantly agrees to start taking pole dancing lessons, but quickly starts to enjoy the classes and begins feeling better about herself. However, when Carrie puts on a show for him, he is shocked by how badly she dances.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Vocal Discord
programme.desc: In an effort to save money, Doug and Carrie ask their neighbour Glenn for counselling since he happens to be a marriage counsellor. Glenn agrees to help out only to have his problem-solving techniques backfire, causing their arguments to get worse.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Consummate Professional
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug lied to her about getting a job at IPS ten years ago.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell
programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable
programme.desc: When Ed and Betty, the owners of a bed and breakfast where Doug and Carrie are staying for a romantic weekend, become too overbearing for them, Carrie forces Doug to tell them they are going to stay at the new Hyatt Hotel across town.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt
programme.desc: When the couple next door decides to sell their home, the Heffernans try to persuade Deacon and Kelly to buy it. Doug and Carrie realize something is wrong when the two are completely disinterested in the home. Danny and Spence try to impress a girl.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: Reconstructing the Crime Scene (Part 1)
programme.desc: On April 15th 2013, two bombs explode during the iconic Boston Marathon, killing three spectators and injuring hundreds others. In a race against time, investigators, using state of the art technology, circulate images to the public.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: The Manhunt (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the Boston Bombing suspects identified as domestic terrorist brothers, the manhunt begins, a terrifying crime spree ensues, and new information sheds light on the heinous crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: The Misery Index: No One Told Sal
programme.desc: Find out what happens when your parachute doesn't open, when your new parent is a sex doll, and what makes Jameela hide behind her podium.

programme.title: The Misery Index: This Is Not a Drill!
programme.desc: Contestants trash talk the Tenderloins, Sal's 'moist moment,' and a giant door-opening python.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.
