programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Hit Him Again
programme.desc: Food Network's Scott Conant and TV host Daphne Oz bring back the "King of Southern Comfort Food" Thomas Boemer, and Brooklyn's Chef Bao Bao back for a rematch for a chance to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Out of the Pan and into the Fire
programme.desc: The arena is on fire as Jersey's Carlos Serrano and L.A.'s Rina Younan battle it out in Bobby's house and things nearly go up in flames when the chefs start to improvise.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Settling the Score
programme.desc: Silent assassin Bruce Kalman has unfinished business to attend to, while young hot-shot Jordan Andino is out to prove he's come a long way since his last match with Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle of Brooklyn
programme.desc: In the battle of Brooklyn's finest, young buck Jordan Andino and industry pro Jennifer Cole-Ruiz duke it out for the chance to get in the ring with Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pot Calling the Kettle Beat
programme.desc: Distinguished chef Jonathan Waxman and Chopped judge Aaron Sanchez have come to ruin Bobby's day, bringing in two chefs who are no strangers to battle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Mavericks
programme.desc: Trash talk is in the air when Iron Chef Michael Symon and Author and TV Host Daphne Oz arrive in the arena to beat up on their friend Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Howdy Halloween
programme.desc: The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson teams up with Cooking Channel's Laura Vitale as they bring in pastry chefs, Katherine Clapner and Joe "The Baker" Baker. Will they trick or treat the judges to show they are better than Bobby Flay?

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fright Club
programme.desc: There's a thrill of fear in the air when TV personality Jesse Palmer and Food Network's Eddie Jackson step into Bobby Flay's arena. Frank "The Bull" Terzoli and the City of Brotherly Love's John Patterson compete.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Double Trouble
programme.desc: It's up to the dynamic duo of Daphne Oz and Damaris Phillips to decide who has the skill to paint Bobby Flay out of the picture as chef and artist Enrique Limardo goes up against Southwestern chef Jeff Smedstad in an all-out culinary battle.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Game On
programme.desc: Chef and former football player Eddie Jackson teams up with "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell for a game day bout with Bobby Flay. They recruit Massachusetts native Ashley Gaboriault and award-winning Las Vegas chef Jeff Henderson.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Blast From The Past
programme.desc: Bobby Flay is haunted when Food Network's Amanda Freitag and Katie Lee bring two ghosts from his past to the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Whiz Kids
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson and kid chefs Gibson Borelli and Tyler Zager have just one homework assignment: beat Bobby Flay! They'll see to it that either California restaurateur Claud Beltran or first-time dad Brian Santos has what it takes.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Time to Get Schooled
programme.desc: Baltimore restaurateur Cindy Wolf and Southern belle Stacie Vande Wetering are put to the test as they aim to teach Bobby Flay a thing or two in the kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Live From the Food Carpet
programme.desc: It's time for Rachel Ray and Ross Mathews to cheer on competitors K.N. Vinod and Gavin Fine as they duke it out to get in the top spot against Bobby Flay. Only one of them will be able to move on.

programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the opilio season, the fleet prepares to make the final push to wrap up their seasons. Captains battle weather, equipment and their own men in a sprint to the finish, but nothing comes easy.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Man Overboard
programme.desc: After enduring months of mechanical breakdowns, sleepless grinds and infighting, the fleet is starting to crack. When the Wizard crew can't lasso a floating walrus carcass, Freddy Maugatai takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Final Battle
programme.desc: The fleet's race to finish the opilio season puts the younger generation to the test. An accident ends a crabber's career.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Storm of the Season
programme.desc: A Category 4 storm has landed on the fleet two weeks into the Oplio Crab Season. As the first pots come aboard some captains are dialed into the crab, while others are off their scent, but they're all struggling to stay afloat.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Sleeping With the Enemy
programme.desc: Survival is the name of the game as the fleet battles their way through a ferocious Arctic storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Final Battle

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Listing Lover

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Loch Ness Conspiracy

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Mummy on the Ghost Ship

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Bermuda Triangle Conspiracy

programme.title: River Monsters: Flesh Ripper

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Third Reich
programme.desc: During World War II, there were reports that the Germans built an operational flying saucer, known as the Hanebu, which was said to use mythical technology found in ancient Indian texts. Take a look at whether Hitler was aided by aliens.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Tech
programme.desc: Ancient texts and art suggest ancient humans had what could be interpreted as alien encounters. Take a look at whether ancient peoples possessed scientific knowledge beyond that of our own century.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Devastations
programme.desc: If ancient aliens visited Earth, they may have been responsible for catastrophes, wars and other deadly disasters that have shaped the fate of the human race.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Temples of Gold
programme.desc: Locals in Cusco, Peru believe UFO sightings are connected to lost gold at the bottom of Lake Puray.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Agenda
programme.desc: Ancient Astronaut theorists have long proposed that extraterrestrials played a pivotal role in our past, and some believe they continue to keep a careful watch over the progress of mankind.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Crystal Skulls
programme.desc: Luminous relics in the shape of human skulls. Otherworldly artifacts believed to harness the secrets of the universe. The Crystal Skulls are some of the most controversial of ancient artifacts.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Mysterious Relics
programme.desc: All around the world, archaeologists have uncovered mysterious relics revered by ancient cultures for thousands of years. Now on display in museums, temples and churches, millions of people travel great distances just to be in their presence.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Forbidden Zones
programme.desc: Certain forbidden sites are often ground zero for chaos and the destruction of ancient artifacts and irreplaceable records detailing mankind's origins and history.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Von Daniken Legacy
programme.desc: Erich von Däniken's controversial theories have captured the attention of the world and ignited a movement known as Ancient Astronaut Theory. Take a look at the facts behind the man and the theory.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The God Particle
programme.desc: The so-called 'God Particle' has been called the key to the universe and possibly the most important scientific breakthrough of all time.

programme.title: Snapped: Nancy Seaman
programme.desc: A popular elementary school teacher is accused of murdering her husband with an axe.

programme.title: Snapped: Ashleigh Pechaluk
programme.desc: A Canadian woman gets caught up in a love triangle and a murder investigation.

programme.title: Snapped: Tracey Frame
programme.desc: Tracey Frame's boyfriend signed his house over to her to avoid repossession, but after a bitter breakup, she refused to give it back. Tracey ended the property dispute by shooting her ex and relocating his body to a storm drain.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Devil in Our Country
programme.desc: A pleasant Michigan day takes a dark turn when a field hand digs up a human skull in a sprawling backyard. The discovery leaves a tight knit community shaken to its core and questioning whether a killer has penetrated the safety of their town.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Dead Girls Don't Talk
programme.desc: A horrific discovery in a backyard cornfield is just the beginning of an unspeakable scene. As horrors unfold in this small, Midwest town, someone is playing a deadly game of cat and mouse and it will be years before a ghastly truth is revealed.

programme.title: Snapped: Mary Winkler
programme.desc: Desperate to find her way out of financial crisis and escape a troubled marriage, this wholesome preacher's wife exchanged virtue for the ultimate vice.

programme.title: Snapped: Sarah Jo Pender
programme.desc: A Canadian woman gets caught up in a love triangle and a murder investigation.

programme.title: Snapped: Kelly Ryan
programme.desc: A fitness queen's assistant is murdered, and the body found in her car.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: Michelle Mockbee is beaten to death at the Kentucky warehouse where she works, and cops realize the killer is likely a co-worker. They must eliminate employees one-by-one until the suspect is finally revealed, along with an outrageous motive.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Keep Your Friends Close
programme.desc: New Jersey teenager Sarah Stern disappears, and cops look to her family and friends for clues. They discover that some of those closest to her may not have been all they seemed, unravelling a tale of misplaced trust and deadly greed.

programme.title: Dateline: 12 Minutes on Elm Street
programme.desc: Cousins Nick Brady and Haile Kifer were best friends. To their family, they seemed like typical teenagers. Turns out, the cousins had a secret that lead to tragedy. The story divided a small town and sparked a national debate.

programme.title: Dateline: In the Middle of the Night
programme.desc: Angie Samota is murdered in her dorm. The stabbing shows lots of rage, giving police a clue: it must be someone close to Angie. Police question everyone close to Angie, but get nowhere. Decades pass and a college friend urges police to take another look.

programme.title: Dateline: Missing Marie
programme.desc: Marie Singleton who worked for the CIA vanishes. Police follow all leads even considering it might be espionage related. Case remained unsolved for years until one day Marie's son Marcus, now a grown man, unleashes a memory of his mother's killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood in the Backyard
programme.desc: A mom and her newborn inexplicably vanish from their California home. When blood is discovered in their backyard, a grieving father is scrutinized and investigators race against the clock to bring this mother and child home before it's too late.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deadly Ally
programme.desc: A land developer disappears into the Arizona desert, and a brother sets out to uncover the truth. But when hikers stumble onto a gruesome discovery, investigators quickly realize no one can be trusted when they find themselves in the line of fire.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Dead Girls Don't Talk
programme.desc: A horrific discovery in a backyard cornfield is just the beginning of an unspeakable scene. As horrors unfold in this small, Midwest town, someone is playing a deadly game of cat and mouse and it will be years before a ghastly truth is revealed.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Devil in Our Country
programme.desc: A pleasant Michigan day takes a dark turn when a field hand digs up a human skull in a sprawling backyard. The discovery leaves a tight knit community shaken to its core and questioning whether a killer has penetrated the safety of their town.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: Eric Glisson was convicted of a murder he swore he didn't commit. To prove his innocence, he had to find the real killers, unearthing their long-held secrets. It would take years for the truth to be revealed, but could it set him free?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Heath Bar Farm
programme.desc: A popular teacher was savagely murdered in her home. There would be an arrest, a trial, and a conviction. When a bombshell came in after the verdict, the convicted murderer was given a chance at freedom.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Quiet One
programme.desc: A beautiful woman thought she'd found her prince charming but their story turned out to be anything but a fairy tale. He was downstairs with the kids while she was upstairs in the bath. Then it happened; was it an accident or murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What They Saw
programme.desc: Detectives believed two young children witnessed the unthinkable, the brutal murder of their mother. The prosecution's case would be built around what they thought those kids observed, but was another version of events possible?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What Happened To The Beauty Queen?
programme.desc: Nona Dirksmeyer was a young beauty queen with a boyfriend she adored. They were planning a future together. Then, Nona was brutally killed. The crime shook her hometown and exposed someone with a secret past.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Circumstances
programme.desc: It was an unthinkable crime. Brittany Eldridge was nearly nine months pregnant when she was found dead in her apartment. Investigators focused on two men believing both had a possible motive but were they capable of murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Halloween Moon
programme.desc: It was just before Halloween. Joel Lovelien and his fiancé headed to a local bar packed with people in costume. Then, Joel stepped outside and walked into a troubling mystery. Police rounded up potential suspects, but could they unmask a killer?

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fear of Flying
programme.desc: Marge's fear of flying is revealed after the family earns a free trip anywhere in the U.S.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Curse of the Flying Hellfish
programme.desc: Abe enlists Bart's help to stop Mr. Burns' plot to steal a legacy of art treasures from their platoon days during the Second World War.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Million Dollar Maybe
programme.desc: Homer blows off Marge to buy a lottery ticket and winds up winning the million-dollar jackpot. Fearing how Marge will react if she finds out why Homer missed their date, Homer keeps his newly inherited fortune a secret until Bart finds out.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Specs and the City
programme.desc: Mr. Burns gives high-tech eyeglasses to all of his employees in order to spy on them. Homer loves the enhanced reality of his new gadget, that is, until Marge tries them on and he finds out she's seeing a marriage counsellor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grampy Can Ya Hear Me
programme.desc: Grampa gets a new hearing aid and finally hears what everyone has been saying about him. Meanwhile, Mr. Skinner discovers that his mother has kept the ultimate secret from him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Forgive and Regret
programme.desc: Grampa makes a confession to Homer while on his deathbed. After his recovery, he comes to realize that this issue will not be easy to reconcile.

programme.title: Family Guy: Shanksgiving

programme.title: Family Guy: Connie's Celica
programme.desc: When Lois gets a job as the music teacher at Chris and Meg's school, a mean student, Connie, decides to make Lois the target of her antics.

programme.title: Family Guy: Short Cuts
programme.desc: When Brian accidentally becomes a local hero, an old street pal and now a successful millionaire dog reaches out and tries to convince him to get neutered. Meanwhile, Lois gets a pixie cut against Peter's wishes.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Americas' Lost Romans
programme.desc: The remains of an abandoned settlement high in the mountains of Peru could be an ancient Roman village, leaving experts to speculate if the Romans visited the Americas centuries before Columbus; if so, it could point to long-lost gold.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Americas' Lost Romans
programme.desc: The remains of an abandoned settlement high in the mountains of Peru could be an ancient Roman village, leaving experts to speculate if the Romans visited the Americas centuries before Columbus; if so, it could point to long-lost gold.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Doomsday at Dragon's Teeth
programme.desc: Eerie ghost ships stranded in an alien desert, sinister ruins known as the Dragon's Teeth, and a ghostly complex with a bloody past are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Blowing Up Hollywood
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy go behind-the-scenes at a premier Hollywood special effects company to reveal the secrets of the world's greatest movie explosions and how cutting-edge tech pushes cinematic carnage to new heights.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fighting Fire with Fire
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet the expert firefighters who use cutting-edge explosive technology to battle dangerous infernos, and using the latest science, they'll find if the best antidote to fire is more fire.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Black Powder Blast
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts of the battlefield who recreate black powder blasts from the Civil War, and using cutting-edge technology, they experiment with this simple yet deadly explosive.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: FBI Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts from the FBI's bomb squad to reveal the cutting-edge forensics and technology required to investigate deadly bomb threats and neutralize them.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at one of the world's largest fireworks companies, and reveal the explosive secrets and cutting-edge innovations of its world-class pyrotechnics experts.

programme.title: How It's Made: Skeletal Replicas, Ice Buckets and Servers, Dining Chairs, In Ground Pools
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Padlocks, Hair Clippers, Wooden Shoes, Synthetic Leather
programme.desc: Features padlocks, hair clippers, wooden shoes and synthetic leather.

programme.title: How It's Made: Statue Restoration, Tripods, Polish Sausages, and Welding Guns
programme.desc: This episode features statue restoration, tripods, polish sausages and welding guns.

programme.title: How It's Made: Baseboard Heaters, Pulp Containers, Video Games
programme.desc: Watch how electric baseboard heaters, moulded pulp containers, and video games are made and how chicken makes it to your plate.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: We Looked Happy
programme.desc: Brooke Lehman was raised to believe Kevin Dunlap was her father. Her mother, Stephanie, kept the truth a secret, but neither of them realized that Kevin was keeping other, far more deadly secrets of his own.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Son's Prisoner
programme.desc: Shelly Lietz had been afraid of her son ever since he was four years old. She knew she saw something evil in his eyes that scared her. As he got older and more violent, that fear crippled her, eventually making her a prisoner in her own home.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: My Lacie
programme.desc: Charisse Christopher escapes her abusive husband and sets up a new, safe home with her three-year-old son Nicholas and her baby Lacie. Several months later, the police discover a scene of slaughter which isn't quite what it seems.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: The Betrayal
programme.desc: In Newfoundland, 19-year-old Greg Parsons ushers in 1991 by wishing his estranged mother Catherine a happy new year. Two days later, Greg is charged with her murder. His journey through the justice system becomes a national story, with a shocking twist.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Hostage to Greed
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a legal secretary in her Macon, Georgia home leaves police with few clues as to who would want her dead. Then, a co-worker's alibi falls apart, revealing a callous conspiracy of greed that shocks this genteel, southern town.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Evil Blossoms
programme.desc: When Alisha Bromfield's supervisor, Brian Cooper, promotes her to team leader she should be ecstatic. But Brian's motives are not entirely good. Alisha stands her ground with Brian, letting him know she doesn't want a relationship beyond co-workers.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: The Betrayal
programme.desc: In Newfoundland, 19-year-old Greg Parsons ushers in 1991 by wishing his estranged mother Catherine a happy new year. Two days later, Greg is charged with her murder. His journey through the justice system becomes a national story, with a shocking twist.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Hostage to Greed
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a legal secretary in her Macon, Georgia home leaves police with few clues as to who would want her dead. Then, a co-worker's alibi falls apart, revealing a callous conspiracy of greed that shocks this genteel, southern town.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Evil Blossoms
programme.desc: When Alisha Bromfield's supervisor, Brian Cooper, promotes her to team leader she should be ecstatic. But Brian's motives are not entirely good. Alisha stands her ground with Brian, letting him know she doesn't want a relationship beyond co-workers.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: My Lacie
programme.desc: Charisse Christopher escapes her abusive husband and sets up a new, safe home with her three-year-old son Nicholas and her baby Lacie. Several months later, the police discover a scene of slaughter which isn't quite what it seems.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Missing Half
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio, a young mother goes missing after attending a party late one evening. As her whereabouts remain unknown for days, the missing woman's identical twin is convinced there is something deeply sinister at play.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: In Rison, Arkansas, a young woman is abducted from her home in the middle of the night. When investigators ultimately dig up her body in the woods, they uncover a horrible murder plot that led to the victim's gruesome demise.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Trail of Tears
programme.desc: A couple's mountain hike turns into a tragedy and the woman's boyfriend is charged with her murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mystery at Eagle Creek
programme.desc: An Oregon man accused of pushing his fiancé off a steep cliff nine years ago to claim a $1 million insurance policy tells Peter Van Sant what may have happened that fateful day.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Maria Spencer's Vow to Kill
programme.desc: A bitter divorce, two arsons and a Pennsylvania father killed execution style; friends say he predicted his own murder.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Evil in South Texas
programme.desc: Billy Staton and his fiancé Leticia Castro vanish without a trace. Have they left town and eloped? The discovery of Billy's burnt out car and a shock confession, reveal a web of lies that only a secret recording can untangle the truth.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Close friends are investigated after the death of an 83-year-old grandfather who was having an affair with a woman half his age.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Dead Man Talking
programme.desc: Dedicated father of two, John Riebe, is found dead on the floor of his home in Toledo, Ohio. The investigation quickly turns on those closest to John, and a series of phone calls and voicemails prove key in uncovering a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: See No Evil: I'd Kill to Be You
programme.desc: On November 12, 2012, Atlanta entrepreneur Terry Porter is found shot dead, execution style in the front yard of his home. There is no forensic evidence and no witnesses to the murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Red Jacket
programme.desc: On Valentine's night, 2015, 27-year-old James Enright is stabbed to death outside a busy train station in Burnaby, Canada. Despite cell phone footage of the attack, police struggle to identify his killer, until CCTV leads them to an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: At Michelle's Door
programme.desc: The News Year's disappearance of Michelle Thornton leads to a gruesome discovery. With no witnesses, only the four security cameras from her apartment building can help decipher what happened.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World
programme.desc: Delve into the unknown stories behind some of the biggest disasters, threats and conquests in America's skies. From the attack on Pearl Harbor, the Hindenburg disaster, Apollo 13 and the race to the Moon.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Gangs of New York

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun

programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lakeside Lounging on Lake Gaston
programme.desc: Amber and Jon are looking for a getaway near their home in Raleigh, NC, and Lake Gaston fits the bill. With assistance from their broker, they find a house with a price that's as perfect as the location but the condition of the home is less than ideal.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Georgia Reno on Their Minds
programme.desc: Outdoor enthusiasts John and Heather are looking for a vacation retreat for their family on Lake Oconee in Georgia, and they find a fixer-upper in an ideal setting.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Modern Farmhouse Fix-up

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Loving Life on Lake Tawakoni in Texas
programme.desc: Water enthusiasts Matt and Heather are looking for a vacation property close to their Dallas home on Lake Tawakoni in Texas.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Cashing in on Curb Appeal
programme.desc: The Dickinsons' strategy to attract potential buyers to a spec home with the curb appeal of a lava stamp driveway has paid off. A realtor has clients who already want to look at the house, but there's still so much work left to do.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Flipping a 1970s Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler flip a 1970s fixer-upper to get it ready for a broker's open. They focus on maximizing the ocean views by designing a new floor plan for the kitchen, and adding a thin cable railing on the lanai to open up the view.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: Lava Stamp of Approval
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler create a custom lava-stamp driveway and front lanai that add major curb appeal to a spec home in the Palisades area of Kona.

programme.title: Building Hawaii: A Pool With An Ocean View
programme.desc: Diandra and Tyler fly to Maui to get inspiration for renovating a vacation rental property back on the Big Island.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Back to School
programme.desc: We're going back to school to learn once and for all what the ultimate nostalgic dish is. We're joining Chef Beau MacMillan in the cafeteria with his Supreme Boffa super-sub sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Singapore
programme.desc: From chicken rice to fish head curry, Andrew explores Singapore's popular foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amsterdam
programme.desc: Look no further than the picture-perfect city of Amsterdam for the best eating in the Netherlands. Built on simple classics like bitterballen and haring, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the Dutch destination so delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montreal
programme.desc: Known as the City of Saints, Montreal, Canada, is blessed with a cuisine formed by global flavours. From poutine to smoked meat to hand-rolled bagels, Andrew Zimmern digs in to the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading to Quebec.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago
programme.desc: Andrew visits the windy city and tastes classic Chicago deep dish pizza and many other great dishes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Milwaukee
programme.desc: Milwaukee may be known for its beer, but it's also home to mouth-watering classic American foods. From cheese curds and bratwurst to frozen custard and butter burgers, Andrew shows us why this Midwestern city is a great food town.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Mysterious Polo Player / The Case of the Secret Treasure
programme.desc: Mira and her friends find a treasure map that leads to the mysterious tunnels under the palace. A mystery polo player appears while Mira and her team are playing.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night at the Nursery/ Seas the Day
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Bluey: The Show / Ticklecrabs / Escape
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four / Feelin' Antsy
programme.desc: When a performance by Bob's favourite band, The Walruses, is canceled, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to ensure the show goes on. Then, when ants invade playcare, the pugs must find a way to get them out.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's Birthday Balloon Bash / Hide-and-Go-Sleep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find a special balloon for Keia's birthday party. When the pugs' cousin, Cody, goes missing during a game of hide-and-seek, Bingo and Rolly must find him before his family comes to pick him up.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Great Shirt Rescue / A Pugatastic Day with Grandma
programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Out Foxed/ Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Freddy's status as the best hide-and-seeker is challenged after he and Pip lose to a baby fox. Pip and Freddy help K.C. earn her first Golden Feather on Cleaning Day.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Nursery Schooling / Bunny Bunanza
programme.desc: After K.C. gets sick, Pip and Freddy watch the babies in the Nursery for her. Then, when delivery batches of bunnies get mixed up, the Junior Fliers must figure out which bunny is which.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: The Search for Squibbles/ Factory Fabulous
programme.desc: Stuffy is distraught when Squibbles goes missing. When Doc brings home a Locker O’Lemurs, the other toys are dazzled by their acrobatic talents.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Pups in the Apple / Won't You Be My Puppy
programme.desc: On the morning of the Playcare bake sale, Bob is devastated when he can't make his "Big Apple" pie because he's out of apples. Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find their favorite television host's special sweater in time for his show.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Sherlock Nose / Block Busters
programme.desc: Follow the Muppet Babies on various adventures as they let their imaginations take flight.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Kung Timmy/ Which Witch is Which?

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Something's Fishy/ Presto Chang-O

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Shiny Teeth/ Odd Odd West

programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise
programme.desc: Candace gets a bad haircut and must rely on Phineas and Ferb's hair growing machine to correct it before she attends the Endangered Animal Benefit. Then, Mom joins Jamie Oliver as one of the judges for Danville's Meatloaf Festival Cook-Off.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lost in Newtopia/ Sprig Gets Schooled
programme.desc: Anne and Polly vow to experience the city like locals but end up on a wild ride through the streets of Newtopia. Sprig is offered a spot at Newtopia University.

programme.desc: Fun-loving magical teen princess, Star Butterfly, who after a few skirmishes with other-worldly monsters, is sent by her Royal Parents to live with the Diaz family on Earth, bringing along her own unique inter-dimensional style to her new planet.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Monster Arm/ The Other Exchange Student
programme.desc: When Marco breaks his arm before a big karate tournament, Star tries to fix it with magic but accidentally turns it into a giant tentacle. The Diazes are visited by their charming former exchange student Gustav, and Star quickly becomes jealous.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Diaz Family Vacation/ Brittney's Party
programme.desc: After inviting the Diaz's on a trip to Mewni as a last minute anniversary present, Star and Marco must save them from a many-headed serpent. Star must fight off Ludo and his army of monsters when they crash Brittney Wong's birthday party.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewberty/ Pixtopia
programme.desc: Marco and his friends run up Star’s Magic Mirror bill with prank phone calls, so they all travel to a dimension of pixies to pay it off. Star starts sprouting hearts all over her body, the telltale sign of Mewberty.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Starsitting/ On the Job
programme.desc: When Star and Marco are in charge of watching Buffrog's tadpoles, the duo's babysitting styles clash. Later, Buffrog has to complete an important mission in order to care for his kids.

programme.title: The Greatest: Upsets
programme.desc: College football has always been a game of Davids and Goliaths. Some of the most indelible results have been the ones that were least expected. These are the top 11 upsets, and the stories behind them.

programme.title: The Greatest: What-Ifs?
programme.desc: Part of the fun is wondering what might have happened if a call went one way instead of another, or a key figure made a different decision or the rules were just a little different. These are the top 11 hypotheticals of all time.

programme.title: The Greatest: Heisman Debates
programme.desc: It's one of the most famous awards in sports, and also one of the most controversial. Every year, the arguments rage all season and then continue as soon as the winner is announced. These are the top 11 Heisman debates in history.

programme.title: The Greatest: Walk-Ons
programme.desc: There's a difference, it turns out, between impossible and improbable. In college football's long history, there have been a handful of incredible stories of walk-ons who became stars. These are the top 11 of all time.

programme.title: Frasier: You Scratch My Book

programme.title: Frasier: The Show Where Sam Shows Up
programme.desc: Frasier's old friend from Boston, Sam Malone, turns up in Seattle to reminisce. Sam soon reveals that he was supposed to have gotten married the previous day, but couldn't go through with it, so Frasier sets out to solve his problems.

programme.title: Frasier: Daphne's Room
programme.desc: Daphne decides to move out of the Crane residence after Frasier continually invades her privacy. When she finds all the Crane men in her room, she decides to quit.

programme.title: Frasier: The Club

programme.title: Frasier: Someone to Watch Over Me
programme.desc: When Frasier is stalked by a fan, he seeks the services of a bodyguard to protect him.

programme.title: Frasier: Breaking the Ice

programme.title: Frasier: An Affair to Forget
programme.desc: After receiving a call from a listener, Frasier suspects Maris is having an affair with her fencing instructor.

programme.title: Frasier: Agents in America, Part Three

programme.title: Frasier: The Innkeepers

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Piece of Cake

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Empty Nests
programme.desc: Renee is feeling depressed and lonely with her children grown up and moved out and her husband's workaholic habits.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Friends
programme.desc: Dorothy learns that Sophia's new friend is suffering from Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: One for the Money
programme.desc: Dorothy and Sophia flashback to their purchase of the family's first television in 1954.

programme.title: Movie: Anything for Love
programme.desc: Katherine believes men are intimidated by her career, creates an internet dating profile claiming she is an executive assistant rather than a high-powered executive.

programme.title: Movie: Love Under the Stars
programme.desc: A woman in her 30s, who has refused to grow up, is forced to face reality. After meeting a young woman and a widower, she begins to re-evaluate her ideas about life and being an adult.

programme.title: Movie: Winter in Vail
programme.desc: A woman inherits a house in Vail, where she meets a man and gets a much-needed break.

programme.title: Movie: A Harvest Wedding
programme.desc: A wedding planner in New York is hired to plan the most anticipated wedding of the season. But the bride wants the wedding to be on the family farm which is now being run by her older brother who happens to be her ex.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?
programme.desc: The boys become obsessed with religion and redemption after they're scared by a sermon about Hell. Meanwhile, Saddam returns to Hell and tries to have Satan's new boyfriend 'taken care of.'

programme.title: South Park: Probably
programme.desc: When their church's answers aren't sufficient to sate the boys' fear, they break off from their church and Cartman takes on the role of evangelical preacher. Meanwhile in Hell, the feud between Chris and Saddam continues.

programme.title: South Park: Cat Orgy
programme.desc: While all the adults are gathering at Mr. Mackey's house to watch a meteor shower Shelly Marsh is left baby-sit Cartman. They square off when she invites her much older boyfriend over.

programme.title: South Park: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with a 'bunch of Melvins.' The ATF believes everyone in the house to be part of a cult, and Stan and the 'Angels' must save the day.

programme.title: South Park: Jewbilee
programme.desc: Kyle invites Kenny to join him and Ike at Jewbilee, a camp for Jewish kids, where they make various arts and crafts as tribute to the great and powerful Moses.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: The Surplus
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. When Michael opens up the floor for suggestions, factions break out and officemates square off against one another to get what they want.

programme.title: The Office: The Duel
programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: Kevin Hart: Laugh at My Pain

programme.title: South Park: My Future Self n' Me

programme.title: South Park: Funnybot

programme.title: South Park: Go Fund Yourself

programme.title: South Park: Let Them Eat Goo
programme.desc: Cartman is sure the new plant-based diet in the school cafeteria gave him a heart attack.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms Halloween Special

programme.title: South Park: Season Finale

programme.title: South Park: Christmas Snow
programme.desc: Santa is stealing all the joy from the town’s Holiday Season.

programme.title: South Park: A Boy and a Priest

programme.desc: Michael and Pam continue their tour of the branches with Michael taking a lesson from their visit to Utica. Dwight and Jim struggle to fulfill their new party planning duties with a grumpy staff. Meanwhile, Angela's new cat causes a stir.

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks
programme.desc: Michael's relationship with the new vice president becomes increasingly tense after he finds excuses to goof off even more than usual. Meanwhile, Pam faces the challenge of a new copier and Kelly develops a crush.

programme.title: The Office: Dream Team
programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: Broke
programme.desc: Michael's new company struggles to make early morning deliveries while the office tries to get their expense reports in on time after Angela enforces Dunder Mifflin's policy.

programme.title: The Office: Casual Friday
programme.desc: Michael has to mediate a dispute within his new sales team. Meanwhile, trouble brews in the office when several employees take the term 'casual' Fridays too loosely.

programme.title: Movie: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: After being abandoned at the Grand Canyon as a child, an adult Joe Dirt, who is now a white-trash janitor, begins a search for his birth parents. He meets many zany people along the way but realizes he belongs with the beautiful Brandy from Silvertown.

programme.title: Movie: The Longest Yard
programme.desc: Paul 'Wrecking' Crewe, a former football superstar, ends up in prison after a drunk driving incident, and is recruited by the warden to put together an inmate football team to compete against the prison guards.

programme.title: The King of Queens: G'Night Stalker
programme.desc: When Doug starts receiving fan mail from someone who saw his performance at a karaoke club, he lets the attention go to his head, only to have his ego shattered when the emails suddenly stop.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Baker's Doesn't
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie run into Father McDaniel at the movies they feel guilty that they haven't been to church in some time and sign up to help out during the busy holiday season. Meanwhile, Arthur and Spence try to write a Christmas carol.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gambling N'Diction
programme.desc: When Doug's mother beats him and the guys in a friendly game of poker, Doug sees an opportunity to capitalize on her poker skills and help him win a high stakes poker tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: Movie: Killer Prom
programme.desc: A high school senior life is shattered when her mother dies, but her hip and young cousin does whatever it takes to turn her life around.

programme.title: Movie: Trapped Model

programme.title: Movie: Dangerous Lessons
programme.desc: A high school teacher must use her wit and strength to save her family from her obsessive stalker- who also happens to be her student.

programme.title: Movie: Homekilling Queen
programme.desc: When an entitled daughter sets her sights on becoming Homecoming Queen, she and her mother will stop at nothing to win the crown.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Tom Petty: Mysterious Ending
programme.desc: News of the sudden passing of celebrated rock musician Tom Petty shocked fans worldwide, but a deeper look into the music legend’s life reveals physical and emotional afflictions that may have led to his death at age 66.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Selena: Fatal Encounter
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of Selena's red-hot career, ambitions and tragic demise. Rare interviews include her close friend and co-fashion designer, the back-up in her band, and a nurse who spoke to Selena and ger killer just before she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: The Taunting
programme.desc: For years the BTK killer plays a cat and mouse game with law enforcement and the media taunting them as he seeks the attention he craves.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Total Meltdown
programme.desc: Suffering the icy burn of possible defeat, Kris wrecks his 3-diver relay plan and abandons his crew. Shawn is forced to question TOMCOD. Emily returns home to Claim 14. Vernon gambles on the edge of the ice.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Cold Man and the Sea
programme.desc: The clock ticks as Shawn races to prove the viability of the TOMCOD. Kris makes amends with his crew and Brad dives for the first time in five years, saving the day with a surprise. Back on Claim 14, Emily tries to break her ice season curse.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Freezer Burn
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: Shawn fights frozen ground and Kris' plan to beat the cold fizzles out as temperatures plummet to a season low. Later, Vernon takes his chances on a new spot.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Up in Flames
programme.desc: As an arctic blizzard wreaks havoc across Nome, Kris finds gold under the ice but fire erupts overhead. Shawn struggles to rescue his operation. Emily risks it all on a double dive and Vernon leans on a diver making her comeback.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Hangry Days
programme.desc: Stranded, freezing and desperate for food, Adam and Evan make a dangerous journey to basecamp. When outpost founders Andrew and Jennifer take control of the food supply, it's the last straw for Adam. Oliver tries to survive solo as temperatures plummet.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Golden Pillars
programme.desc: Mining for gold is a dangerous business with flipped trucks, burning washplants and sunken excavators are just a few of the many possible hazards. Experts in the field reveal how cutting-edge tech and ingenuity are making the job safer and more efficient.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Up in Flames
programme.desc: As an arctic blizzard wreaks havoc across Nome, Kris finds gold under the ice but fire erupts overhead. Shawn struggles to rescue his operation. Emily risks it all on a double dive and Vernon leans on a diver making her comeback.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Hangry Days
programme.desc: Stranded, freezing and desperate for food, Adam and Evan make a dangerous journey to basecamp. When outpost founders Andrew and Jennifer take control of the food supply, it's the last straw for Adam. Oliver tries to survive solo as temperatures plummet.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Nugget Hunter
programme.desc: Rick and his dad fly high into Keno mountains on a treasure hunt. Parker makes a decision about his crew that could determine the fate of his season. Tony checks a spot the old dredges missed and assesses which of his kids might take over one day.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: Mother of All Thunderdomes
programme.desc: Exploding balls, a barrage of buckshot and a new adversary making its debut all plague contestants competing for a shot at the $25,000 grand prize. A realtor tries to close the deal and a hospital administrator may need his employee discount.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A propane explosion in Australia, a tornado destroys a ranch in Kansas.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Army Medal of Honor Recipient - Al Lynch
programme.desc: A decorated Vietnam veteran recounts saving the lives of three men and life after receiving the medal of honour from Nixon.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out: Ed vs Hakim Isler
programme.desc: Ed goes head to head with ex-PSYOPS marine and real-life ninja, Hakim Isler, in the notorious Zoige Marshes of Sichuan Province. It's a test of willpower for both men as they sink in strength-sapping quick-mud.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: Bass Pro Tour: 2020 Stage Four Heavy Hitters Championship Round - Kissimmee
programme.desc: Anglers compete for $100000 and a $100000 Big Bass Bonus in Stage 4 Heavy Hitters Championship Round from Kissimmee, Florida.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Performance Pinto
programme.desc: The team continues converting the rusted '71 Pinto into a European performance car despite the passed deadline. Unwilling to compromise on the original vision, Chad presses on both day and night to get his creation ready for its dramatic big city reveal.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Samurai Sword of Power
programme.desc: Josh explores ancient shrines hidden in the mountains and underground tunnels across Japan in search for the missing mystical Honjo sword. Along the way, Josh learns the ways of the samurai and forges his own samurai sword.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Curse of the Golden Bell
programme.desc: Josh joins local divers in the Southeast Asian country of Myanmar to search for the ancient cursed Golden Bell of King Dhammazedi. To recover it, Josh dives into murky, violent waters that have claimed the lives of other divers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Sultan's Heart
programme.desc: Josh travels to Turkey and Hungary searching for the heart of a former ruler.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: True Cross of Christ
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul to pursue the True Cross of Christ.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Africa's Gold Hoard
programme.desc: Josh searches for the Kruger Millions in the harsh wild of South Africa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Origins of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Josh travels to his ancestral home of Great Britain to explore the origins of Stonehenge. From high in the air to deep under the sea, he finds an unexpected network of monuments that could have inspired one of history's most mystical locations.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Digging Into D-Day
programme.desc: Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Darcey & Stacey: Clashes and Curve Balls
programme.desc: Darcey and Georgi bask in the afterglow of their romantic NYC date. When Darcey returns to Connecticut, she and Stacey ramp up for their trip to LA, but Mike drops a bomb on the twins that may derail their plans.

programme.title: Darcey & Stacey: Caught on Tape

programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: World Class Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's crossing the country to get a taste of world-class flavour. From California to Florida and Seattle to Massachusetts, he's divin' into classic Greek, legit pierogis, and real-deal Belgian waffles made European-style.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Totally Fried
programme.desc: Guy Fieri searches for great joints where they're frying up a storm.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bar Food and Bon Bons
programme.desc: Guy rolls coast to coast looking for flavour, and finds it in the most interesting places.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Can Only Get It Here
programme.desc: Guy is on the hunt for funky flavours, starting in San Francisco at an Asian/American/Mexican fusion joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to Tampa Bay for authentic Mexican street food served out of a bus. In Virginia Beach, he has dinner at a popular seafood joint, and in San Antonio he visits a breakfast joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Standards, New Styles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is hitting up spots serving comfort food that has been turned up a notch. In Long Beach, CA., and old school diner with a new chef is cooking some home-style classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh Fish and Funky Chicken
programme.desc: Guy is hitting the road for some outrageous seafood and tasty chicken. In Des Moines, Iowa, the trophy-winning barbecue joint is dishing out unique wings and an apple dumpling dessert.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Ordering All Kinds of Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cooks takeout with four DDD alums via video chat. There's real deal Italian from Scottsdale, AZ, American Indian fare from Denver, gourmet grub out of a Massachusetts lounge and short ribs all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: One Street Wonders
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is heading to Cincinnati to try three righteous restaurants all on the same street. He checks out The Funky Pub where they're serving up all kinds of hot dogs and sammies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multitaskers
programme.desc: A Greek diner is decked out in neon and servin' up family recipes like Yia Yia's grape leaves. In Oxnard, Calif., the jack of all trades joint is baking, brewing and cooking all in the same restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Biscuits to Brisket
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging in to stick-to-your-ribs comfort food. In Atlanta, the down-home joint cooking up righteous chicken and biscuits and house-cured lox.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Extra Helpings
programme.desc: This trip, it's an exclusive peek at the lost footage of DDD: the places Guy Fieri's visited before, but all-new dishes never seen until now. Guy's digging in to money mussels, crispy pork skin and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Ordering All Kinds of Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cooks takeout with four DDD alums via video chat. There's real deal Italian from Scottsdale, AZ, American Indian fare from Denver, gourmet grub out of a Massachusetts lounge and short ribs all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly Up to Barcelona
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's crossing the Atlantic to take a big bite out of Barcelona, Spain. He's diving in to the many different cuisines the city has to offer, from a homey spot serving Galician-style octopus and soup.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Round the World Roundup
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into a world of flavours all over the United States! In Smyrna, Georgia, a doctor-turned-chef fires up amazing Asian from righteous ramen to Korean wings. In Austin, Texas, two buddies turn out their tasty take on tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory with a Side of Sweet
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is jumping into some sweet and savory dishes. In Burlington, Vt., a vegan joint gettin' crazy with a crunch wrap and coconut-banana French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple-D All-Stars
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's in the kitchen with some real Triple-D all-stars, cookin' up everything from gangster Greek in Salt Lake City to creative curry in Denver to amazing Asian in Miami and North Pole, Alaska.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Globe Tasting
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting an authentic taste of all ends of the earth. In Bakersfield, Calif., the firehouse-turned-restaurant firing up Latin-fusion favorites like basque lamb tacos and popcorn pork with a side of zing.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soakin' Up Maui
programme.desc: Guy's cruising the islands with his buddy, Chef Reno Henriques, on a culinary tour of Maui, Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mex to the Max
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's crossing the states to get some south of the border flavor. From Florida to California, Southwest to Midwest, he's diving into everything from tacos, tamales and tortas to al pastor and pozole. Plus, fiery burritos and seafood sensations.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
