programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Pre-Game Perfection
programme.desc: A simple yet satisfying pre-game meal that will make you the hero.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Football Fun and Food
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites her family over for football, fun and lots of food, Cajun-style. Valerie serves her quickest gumbo ever, alongside a fresh spring salad. Red pepper hummus is on the menu and Valerie pays tribute to her father-in-law.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Breakfast of Champions
programme.desc: We're tailgating bright and early with a breakfast of champions. Sunny kicks things off with her breakin' the fast burger and Katie Lee brings her breakfast MVP, a slow cooker hash brown casserole. Jeff makes crispy buttermilk popcorn chicken.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Southern Tailgate
programme.desc: Tailgating usually goes hand in hand with sports events, but Trisha has been hosting music-themed tailgate parties for years. Today she brings the tailgate home with her fan-favourite recipes and shares behind-the-scenes tour footage.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Appetizer Perfection
programme.desc: Molly is sharing her favourite appetizer recipes, starting with BBQ pulled pork nachos. She also makes gooey fried mozzarella sticks, ham and cheese jalapeno poppers with a spicy kick and flaky walleye cakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Tailgate Get-Togethers
programme.desc: Ree shares a lineup of tailgate-friendly favourites including Italian pork sandwiches and butternut squash and black bean enchiladas. There are also easy slow-cooker teriyaki ribs and a Greek seven-layer dip that's perfect for fall.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quarterback Mom
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's quarterback teens have a big game coming up, and she's getting ahead by making their favorite food for a post-game dinner. Win or lose, they'll enjoy a fabulous meal of meatball subs.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Comfort Food Classics
programme.desc: The Kitchen is cozying up to comfort food classics! Katie Lee shares her grandma's creamy chicken and dumplings, and Jeff Mauro and his dad combine two favourites.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Grillin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites friends over for an afternoon Lowcountry cookout. On the menu are Grilled Mahi Sandwiches, Grilled Shrimp Macaroni Salad and Grilled Potatoes tossed with EVOO and Chives. For something sweet, Kardea whips up a Berry Dump Cake.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: All About Family
programme.desc: Family and traditions mean a lot to Trisha, who shares her favoruite family recipes handed down over generations. The recipes include old-fashioned potato-beef casserole and Brunswick stew as well as a coconut cloud cake.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pizza Pro Playoffs
programme.desc: Four professional pizza makers rise to the occasion in three pizza-themed Grocery Games that determine who gets to take home all the dough. Guy Fieri challenges the chefs to shop for the ingredients in their signature pizza using only a mini pizza box.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD-licious Burgers
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his favorite burger chefs from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives to compete in Flavortown and grill, baby, grill. First, Guy has the chefs shop for ingredients in their signature burger and loaded fries combo using only tongs and a grill lid.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Big Bacon Battle
programme.desc: Four chefs try to prove that everything’s better with bacon.

programme.desc: Three sisters get more than they bargained for when they decide to take photos in a graveyard at night. Then, a young family's day hike turns into a nightmare when they are terrorized by an unknown creature in the woods.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: Cabin in the Woods and Bigfoot Encounter
programme.desc: While traveling for a friend's wedding, James and Weste begrudgingly accept an offer to stay in an abandoned cabin in the woods. A night of terror ensues, with paranormal encounters lasting through the night. Then, Eric is stalked by an unknown creature.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: The Hell Hound
programme.desc: While exploring an abandoned hospital in Ohio, Amy encounters an uneasy presence in a cell and quickly flees from the building. Little does she know, the entity has latched onto her and stalks her to the woods surrounding her home.

programme.title: Terror in the Woods: Bigfoot Showdown & The Catacombs
programme.desc: Rodney's camping trip in Kentucky turns life threatening as he and his fellow campers are tormented through the night by a Bigfoot creature. Then, a group of friends access a catacomb in Georgia where they perform a séance that goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Heirloom of Doom

programme.title: My Horror Story: Run, Ghost Boy, Run

programme.title: My Horror Story: Return to Horror
programme.desc: A woman awakens a powerful evil when she returns to her childhood home. A soldier moves into a new home after completing his tour of duty in Iraq and is thrown right back into battle this time with the paranormal.

programme.title: My Horror Story: The Devil Inside
programme.desc: A man is horrified to learn he is the target of a biblical demon that will stop at nothing to possess his soul. A ghostly woman steps out of a young artist's dreams and into reality.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Encountering Evil
programme.desc: Strange and scary occurrences make a man question his beliefs while renovating an old mansion. A young woman struggles to free herself from the demonic entity that destroyed her family.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: 50 Shades of Greystone

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Bleecker and Bleaker
programme.desc: At the Metropolitan Tower, Luis and Ryan find co-operating on their co-listing to be co-mplicated. And when Ryan's fiancée Emilia gets in the middle, it teeters from deal to deal breaker.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Planet of the Capes
programme.desc: Ryan pushes his luck with a downtown duplex by trying a new pricing strategy that's also trying the buyers' patience. Fredrik lands in deep water when he promises a buyer something his building developer might not be able to deliver.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: No Sleep Till Brooklyn Sells
programme.desc: Fredrik reunites with an old client in Williamsburg, but when she changes plans at the last minute, his launch struggles to lift off. A few blocks away, Luis hopes to repair his rocky relationship with a rebellious co-lister. Ryan tackles a townhouse.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Murray Up and Wait
programme.desc: A phone call gives new life to Fredrik on a development, but it comes with a catch. Ryan bends over backwards to accommodate a potential buyer, and gets zero bend in return. Luis is given first dibs on a hot new building in Tribeca.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Tug of Warhol
programme.desc: For a new development in NoHo, Fredrik wigs out and summons the spirit of a dead icon. Plus, after a failed first shot at a new building, Luis aims for a rebound by chasing down one of New York City’s biggest developers.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: A More Modern Family

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: No Moore Mr. Nice Guy

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Take a Walker
programme.desc: Fredrik confronts a competitive broker who's circling his $30 million penthouse like a vulture. Meanwhile, Luis tries anything to help sell his listings fora buyer, and her dog while Ryan lands a listing that previously let go of another broker, Fredrik.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Windows to Your Sale

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Dark Owl
programme.desc: The school principal Mr. Damocles gets akumatized into Dark Owl. Armed with high-tech gadgets, he wants to get revenge on Ladybug and Cat Noir. To stop him, our heroes will have to ruffle his feathers.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Syren
programme.desc: A talented swimmer named Ondine gets akumatized into Syren. She has feelings for Kim and wants to turn Paris into an underwater kingdom for her prince.

programme.title: Jessie: Moby and Scoby
programme.desc: When Jessie goes back to college, her and Ravi end up sharing the same class. Zuri brings home a baby giraffe from Africa.

programme.title: Jessie: Basket Case
programme.desc: Eager to play in Luke's basketball game, Ravi unexpectedly runs into LA Clippers star Chris Paul, who he enlists to coach him. Meanwhile, Jessie learns that Hudson is her new classmate and is unhappily forced to partner with him for an assignment.

programme.title: Jessie: Someone Has Tou-pay
programme.desc: Bertram bought a new toupee for his band's big performance, but when it goes missing, Jessie interrogates each of the kids in hopes of finding it.

programme.title: Jessie: Bye Bye Bertie
programme.desc: Bertram has had enough, so decides to quit and to go work for Mrs. Chesterfield. Meanwhile, the Ross family hires a new butler, Roger, who takes his job very seriously.

programme.title: Jessie: Driving Miss Crazy
programme.desc: Emma wants her license, so Jessie teaches her how to drive. Ravi and Luke accidentally break one of Zuri's games, forcing a stand-off.

programme.title: Movie: Frozen
programme.desc: A princess sets out to find her sister, the Queen, so she can put an end to the spell that was accidentally cast, putting their kingdom frozen in eternal winter.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Stormy Weather
programme.desc: After losing a contest to become lead host on the Kidz Plus children's channel, Aurore is akumatized into Stormy Weather. With villainy in the forecast, it's up to Ladybug and Cat Noir to stop her and bring sunshine back to Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Bubbler
programme.desc: Armed with his magical bubble-wand, Nino becomes The Bubbler, a villain who wants to rid the city of all parents who get in the way of kids having fun. Ladybug and Cat Noir try to avoid his bubbles and save the day.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Guitar Villain
programme.desc: Angered by an arrogant young singer called Mr. XY, Jagged Stone is akumatized into Guitar Villain, a rock'n'roll super-villain.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Reflekta
programme.desc: When Juleka's picture day 'curse' is made worse by being excluded from the class picture, Juleka is akumatized and turns into Reflekta.

programme.title: Washington Journal

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Farm
programme.desc: Bill and Shirley Carter had raised a family on their sprawling farm in America's heartland. As their golden years approached, tragedy struck and the seeds of a mystery pitting one family member against another had been planted.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Somebody’s Daughter
programme.desc: Detectives often hit dead ends that can stop them cold but, for one young detective, dead ends were just another place to start. She'd beaten the odds in her own life. Now, she was determined to beat them on the job using her head and her heart.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Death in the Driveway
programme.desc: Melvin Roberts was larger than life. Former mayor. Prominent attorney. He even had a street named after him. When cops found him dead in his driveway, it marked the start of a tough case. In addition to friends, Melvin Roberts had plenty of enemies.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Devil in Our Country
programme.desc: A pleasant Michigan day takes a dark turn when a field hand digs up a human skull in a sprawling backyard. The discovery leaves a tight knit community shaken to its core and questioning whether a killer has penetrated the safety of their town.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Dead Girls Don't Talk
programme.desc: A horrific discovery in a backyard cornfield is just the beginning of an unspeakable scene. As horrors unfold in this small, Midwest town, someone is playing a deadly game of cat and mouse and it will be years before a ghastly truth is revealed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Death in the Driveway
programme.desc: Melvin Roberts was larger than life. Former mayor. Prominent attorney. He even had a street named after him. When cops found him dead in his driveway, it marked the start of a tough case. In addition to friends, Melvin Roberts had plenty of enemies.

programme.title: Snapped: Joanna Hayes
programme.desc: A woman goes to deadly extremes to help her son win a custody battle with his ex.

programme.title: Snapped: Ellen Snyder
programme.desc: A mother-son relationship is tested when a murder comes between them.

programme.title: Snapped: Clara Schwartz
programme.desc: A young woman’s obsession with fantasy role-playing games ends with the real world murder of her father.

programme.title: Snapped: Jennifer Bowen
programme.desc: A custody issue is resolved when a woman and her new husband kill her ex.

programme.title: Snapped: Regina Williams
programme.desc: A case that could be a hit-and-run murder or an abused woman or woman scorned.

programme.title: Snapped: Tyonne Palmer
programme.desc: A love triangle between a preacher, his son and his girlfriend ends in death.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Player
programme.desc: A double murder revealed a double life. The victims were a well-respected couple. Their son played poker for a living. His alibi was his ace in the hole. But when detectives found key evidence, they thought they were holding all the cards.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in a Small Town
programme.desc: Her life ended in mystery on a dead-end road. A mother of three, she was beloved by her family and tight-knit community. For years the murder investigation went cold, however secrets have a way of eventually coming out.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: Big sky country and a dangerous highway set the scene of a fatal car crash. Was the tragedy an accident, or was the crash a crime, were the secrets masking the truth hiding in text messages sent just before a car crossed the line.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Interrogation
programme.desc: A young mother and her son are found dead in a house fire. Police suspected foul play. A confession led to a guilty verdict, but what really happened during the interrogation. This is an extraordinary look inside the interview room.

programme.title: License to Kill: Deadly Pharmacist
programme.desc: Deception and greed drive a local pharmacist in Kansas City down an evil path, affecting the lives of thousands of helpless and trusting cancer patients who believe they're getting life-saving treatment.

programme.title: License to Kill: Death by Miracle Cure
programme.desc: Detectives in Colorado investigate a Naturopathic Doctor after two of his patients develop horrific side effects from dubious miracle treatments. What they uncover is a deadly history of fraud and barbaric, invasive medical treatments.

programme.title: License to Kill: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: In the midst of the emerging opioid epidemic, investigators in Los Angeles look into a cluster of mysterious overdose deaths of young men in their 20's and discover a Doctor who uses her prescription pad to line her pockets and kill her patients.

programme.title: Snapped: Tracey Richter
programme.desc: A mother is hailed as a hero when she kills a home intruder, but a secret journal leads police to suspect she may have planned a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Shelia Eddy
programme.desc: A family searches for a missing teen only to find out she’s been betrayed by her closest friends.

programme.title: Snapped: Ajelina Lewis
programme.desc: A young father is murdered; suspicion turns to his child’s mother.

programme.title: Snapped: Carol Kopenkoskey
programme.desc: A 39-year marriage ends in a brutal death, revealing a surprising tale of adultery and murder.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: The Simpsons: What to Expect When Bart's Expecting
programme.desc: Bart can't stand art class, so he makes a voodoo doll of his art teacher. But when his spell makes her pregnant instead, he becomes a saviour to Springfield couples trying to conceive. Then, he's kidnapped to help conceive a thoroughbred racehorse.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brick Like Me
programme.desc: Homer wakes up in a world where his family and everyone in Springfield are made of Legos. Can he 'put together' how he got there and figure out how to get home before he's stuck in a world of bricks forever?

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pay Pal
programme.desc: Marge swears off befriending any more couples when Homer offends their charming new British neighbours. But when Lisa declares that she, too, doesn't need friends, Marge reconsiders.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Clown in the Dumps
programme.desc: The unthinkable happens: a Springfield resident dies. Also, Krusty retires after he's offended by a comedy cable channel roast of him, and Lisa tries to protect Homer from getting hurt.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wreck of the Relationship
programme.desc: When Bart disrespects Homer's authority, Homer makes a point to try his hand at parenting. This proves fruitless, so Marge signs them up for the Relation Ship, where they’ll resolve their conflicts at sea.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXV
programme.desc: On the annual spooktacular Halloween special, Bart and Lisa are transported to a demon-filled alternate universe after Bart reads a set of Aramaic symbols he finds on the underside of his desk.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Opposites A-Frack
programme.desc: Lisa brings in Assemblywoman Maxine Lombard to put a stop to Mr. Burns' fracking operation, but is taken aback when the two political opponents find themselves attracted to one another.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpsorama
programme.desc: 'Futurama's' Planet Express crew comes to present-day Springfield to prevent the Simpsons from destroying the future.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Blazed and Confused
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a new teacher, Mr. Lassen, who vows to crush his spirit.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Covercraft
programme.desc: Homer has a mid-life crisis, takes up bass guitar and forms a cover band with some of the other dads in town. But the band's modest early success is soon overwhelmed by the breakout potential of their most unlikely star, Apu.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: After Moe convinces Homer to stay out drinking on Christmas Eve, Marge tells Homer not to come home. This leads to Homer's sad trek through lonely Springfield, where he learns that the only place where one should truly get drunk on Christmas is home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: During a trip to 'Dizzneeland' the Simpsons board the wrong ride, Rocket To Your Doom, and are transported through the galaxy to Kang and Kodos’ home planet, where they are held captive at the local zoo.

programme.title: Family Guy: Absolutely Babulous
programme.desc: When Stewie receives a participation medal in his school's toddler games, he begins to question everything he has ever won. Meanwhile, Peter causes a fight between Lois' parents and must repair the damage he caused.

programme.title: Family Guy: Short Cuts
programme.desc: When Brian accidentally becomes a local hero, an old street pal and now a successful millionaire dog reaches out and tries to convince him to get neutered. Meanwhile, Lois gets a pixie cut against Peter's wishes.

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: Palace Intrigue: Part I
programme.desc: Archer and the rest of the ISIS gang are the guests of Gustavo Calderon and his wife Juliana. Calderon is a big fan of Cherlene, but Juliana is a bigger fan of Archer.

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: Palace Intrigue: Part II
programme.desc: Archer tries to keep his fling with the dictator's wife a secret while Krieger bonds with his clone brothers.

programme.title: Movie: Snatched
programme.desc: After her boyfriend dumps her on the eve of their exotic vacation, Emily convinces her cautious mother to go with her. Polar opposites, they are forced to get over their differences as mother and daughter when they are kidnapped by a dangerous group.

programme.title: Movie: Trainwreck
programme.desc: A commitment-phobic magazine writer is surprised to find her interest going beyond a one-night stand when she goes out with a nice-guy sports doctor on whom she's writing an article.

programme.title: Movie: The Simpsons Movie
programme.desc: Homer's actions cause a leak of radioactive material from the Nuclear Plant into the river. Homer has to try and fix the problem before Springfield can no longer be saved.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Ring (But Not Scary)

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Motor, She Boat
programme.desc: Tina and Bob participate in the Thundergirls father-daughter cardboard boat race and Tina tries to hide her feelings about Bob’s terrible boat-building skills. Meanwhile, Linda drags Louise and Gene to a fire station open house and overstays her welcome.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Former IMF agent Ethan Hunt is on a new mission. He must rescue a fellow agent from dangerous arms dealer Owen Davian. Hunt must rely on a new cast of agents and some old friends to help save the day.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: American spy agent Ethan Hunt falls under false suspicion of disloyalty and must expose the real spy without the help of his organization.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt must go to Australia to destroy a disease created by a terrorist group made to wipe out and infect the world.

programme.title: Movie: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Former IMF agent Ethan Hunt is on a new mission. He must rescue a fellow agent from dangerous arms dealer Owen Davian. Hunt must rely on a new cast of agents and some old friends to help save the day.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Monterey Bay
programme.desc: Explore the marine ecosystem of the Monterey Bay, California where a giant kelp forest hosts one of the most diverse ecologies in the world.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Spring
programme.desc: Wildlife cameraman Gordon Buchanan travels to Norway's Svalbard archipelago, where he meets, tracks and hunkers down with a family of polar bears.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Summer
programme.desc: Gordon finds that things have not gotten easier for the polar bears when he returns to Svalbard in the summer.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Autumn
programme.desc: Lyra is struggling to care for her cub while fighting off starvation in Autumn.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Islands
programme.desc: How the South Pacific islands has affected human culture.

programme.title: South Pacific: Castaways
programme.desc: Learn how some of the most isolated islands became habited.

programme.title: South Pacific: Endless Blue
programme.desc: Much of the South Pacific is a marine desert, but some areas support diverse life. Following how the ocean creatures survive the harsh conditions they live in.

programme.title: South Pacific: Ocean of Volcanoes
programme.desc: The birth, growth and death of an island in the South Pacific.

programme.title: South Pacific: Strange Islands
programme.desc: On the isolated islands of the South Pacific, wildlife has evolved in extraordinary ways, but island living may carry a high price because when new species arrive, all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: See No Evil: Loretta's Last Valentine
programme.desc: On February 14th, 2014, pregnant college student Loretta Saunders vanishes without trace. Her trail runs cold after she is spotted on CCTV at her apartment building. The race is now on to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, a 14-year-old girl vanishes without a trace on her way to school. Her parents have no idea where she could be. Investigators follow a trail of surveillance footage, but are unsure if they will find her before its too late.

programme.title: See No Evil: Come Home Sierra
programme.desc: 15-year-old Sierra LaMar leaves for school like any other day, only to disappear without a trace. Surveillance footage helps reveal if she is just another typical runaway or if something a lot worse happens to Sierra.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Ride Home
programme.desc: A wealthy labour lawyer shoots his high profile wife from the back seat of a car, and questions are raised about whether it was an accident or plain murder.

programme.title: The Lost Boys of Bucks County
programme.desc: When four young men mysteriously disappear from Bucks County, Pennsylvania, the entire nation is left wondering what became of them. Police join forces and follow the clues, leading them straight to a troubled killer with no regard for human life.

programme.title: The Lost Boys of Bucks County
programme.desc: When four young men mysteriously disappear from Bucks County, Pennsylvania, the entire nation is left wondering what became of them. Police join forces and follow the clues, leading them straight to a troubled killer with no regard for human life.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Alaskan Temptress
programme.desc: A Washington community is shocked when PTA mom, Mechele Linehan is arrested for murder from a decade earlier in Alaska. Details of a seedy and sordid past emerge. But is this suburban mother a cold-blooded temptress or has she been wrongly accused?

programme.title: The Lost Boys of Bucks County
programme.desc: When four young men mysteriously disappear from Bucks County, Pennsylvania, the entire nation is left wondering what became of them. Police join forces and follow the clues, leading them straight to a troubled killer with no regard for human life.

programme.title: The Lost Boys of Bucks County
programme.desc: When four young men mysteriously disappear from Bucks County, Pennsylvania, the entire nation is left wondering what became of them. Police join forces and follow the clues, leading them straight to a troubled killer with no regard for human life.

programme.title: American Monster: Just Out of Frame
programme.desc: A fun-loving couple, both business-owners, share a close relationship with their grown daughters. So when the mother is found gruesomely bludgeoned to death in her own home, no one suspects the unthinkable. But unlike guilty people, video doesn't lie.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Investigating the strange tale of two double murders, five years apart, that shook two quiet Omaha neighbourhoods and led police to an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Innocence Interrupted
programme.desc: The murders of a teenage boy who never returns home from school and a teenage girl who is ambushed as she sits in a car with friends devastate their communities.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Dangerous Houses
programme.desc: 18-year-old Brookelyn Farthing disappears in 2013 after attending a party in the small town of Berea, Kentucky. And then, 24-year-old Lindsay Buziak, a young beautiful realtor, is found brutally killed after showing some new clients a million-dollar home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Killers Among Us?
programme.desc: A respected police officer heads home after a late shift, and a young man who has just moved into his own place relaxes after watching football. Both of these seemingly routine evenings turn deadly.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Her Last Night Out
programme.desc: They head out into the night, full of youthful life and promise, but they never come back. Now, clues from behind bars may help solve the mysteries that surround the disturbing disappearances of two women.

programme.title: Shattered: False Prophet
programme.desc: 1994. Middle River, MD. Christmas Day. A murder rocks a family's Christmas celebration... a mother prepares a holiday dinner for a son who never arrives... and a detective unearths a dark secret that shatters a town's faith.

programme.title: Shattered: Requiem for Murder
programme.desc: In 1992, when a woman in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania is attacked, police eye a local family man as the suspect. But one detective thinks everyone's got it all wrong: this attack isn't a one-off - it's the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: Shattered: Seven and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Mid 1980's. A District Attorney in Wichita Falls, Texas has multiple gruesome homicides to solve. A father's grief provokes him to meet his daughter's killer face to face, and over 100 miles away, a husband is accused of the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Shattered: The Pact
programme.desc: In 1990, a teenage boy vanishes. Nearly two decades later, there's still no trace of him, dead or alive. It's a mother's worst nightmare, but one detective refuses to stop looking until he's able to solve this mystery.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: Deadly Message
programme.desc: A young man who overcame a devastating brain injury enters a taxi and never resurfaces. Police are at a loss until they receive a mysterious text that pivots the case in a new direction and intensifies the race to bring Julian Williams home alive.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: The Long Way Home
programme.desc: A blood-stained bicycle hidden in an Ohio cornfield sets the stage for an unspeakable crime. While police race to find missing college student Sierah Joughin, a vicious predator lurks somewhere in the rural, Midwestern countryside.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Chase Me
programme.desc: A 50-year-old woman is found dead in her home. All that's left behind is a note that reads, 'Chase me.' But when detectives uncover the killer, they quickly discover they have come face to face with a remorseless psychopath.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Into the Woods at Midnight
programme.desc: Residents of a quaint village are terrified when a local innkeeper and two others are found brutally murdered. Detectives in Maine must follow the depraved killer into the woods at night as he leads them to where he killed and buried his fourth victim.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I'm Not the Monster I Was
programme.desc: An unapologetic 14-year-old boy confesses to the murder of his best friend. Twelve years later, he's back in court with chance at a reduced sentence.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Where Evil Grows
programme.desc: A charming 20-year-old wants to help authorities with a murder investigation. He claims to have met one of the three victims and says he has no knowledge of the crime, but detectives suspect otherwise.

programme.title: American Monster: Home Video Hit
programme.desc: A typical American family isn't exactly what it seems. In public, Max and Janeene Jones appear to have the perfect marriage, but behind this happy image lies hidden truths. 20 years later, an undercover police investigation reveals an unexpected killer.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs in the Past and Present
programme.desc: From the lore and history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and even the art of the Renaissance period, mankind's past is riddled with the evidence of UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs. The truth about alien contact is not limited to the military, and in fact, many believe such secrets extend well into outer space, even on Mars itself.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Two Homes in Mexico
programme.desc: Gonzolo Martinez is a 17-year old gang member, sentenced to 48 years in prison. A chance arises, and Martinez escapes to Mexico and becomes a drug dealer. Only when Martinez tries to cross the border, do the feds get their chance to capture him.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make You a Superstar
programme.desc: A scam artist conned aspiring artists out of millions. A modern day Bonnie and Clyde eluded police until a slip-up led to their doorstep.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Murder My Own Family
programme.desc: James Wiley was given a life sentence after killing his step-mom and three young brothers.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Get Revenge
programme.desc: Scott Eizember has a temper and a history of abuse. So when his girlfriend dumps him, Scott wants revenge. He goes on a violent spree, but is injured during his pursuit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fetch a Hooker
programme.desc: Lane Slettvet, a muscle man for a drug dealer, liked to test fate. One night on a job to pick up a prostitute, Slettvet stabs a man. He tries to stay under the radar, but still goes to parties for the drugs.

programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Adventure
programme.desc: We take you on a gastro-tour of some of the most adventurous efforts in dining today.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Hand-Held Eats

programme.title: Unique Eats: Sandwiches

programme.title: Movie: Face/ Off
programme.desc: A member of an FBI antiterrorist team trades faces with a convicted criminal.

programme.desc: Jack and Diane are tired of being twins, and after much pleading, Dre and Bow give in to letting them explore their lives as individuals. Meanwhile, Dre buys Zoey her first car, and she is over the moon.

programme.title: Mysteries Decoded: The Montauk Experiments
programme.desc: Jennifer Marshall and Sam Tripoli go to Montauk to investigate a conspiracy that the government was conducting experts on young children.

programme.title: Penn & Teller: Fool Us: Brad Sherwood's Nuts
programme.desc: Featured magicians include Mike Hammer, Lea Kyle, Dante and Takamiz Usui.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Abstinence
programme.desc: George is forced to abstain from sex when his girlfriend develops mononucleosis and soon discovers that his mind is sharper. Kramer transforms his apartment into a smoking lounge.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Race
programme.desc: Jerry meets an old rival who suspects him of cheating in a high school race. Elaine is 'blacklisted' for Chinese food delivery. George responds to a personal ad in a Communist newspaper while at work. Kramer becomes a department store Santa.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I'd Like to Start With the Cat
programme.desc: Charlie finds himself in couples counselling.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Girls Don't Throw Food
programme.desc: Alan prepares Walden for a date with Bridget, while Jake decides to emulate Walden and drop out of school.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Hersheypark
programme.desc: Adam discovers Beverly has been manipulating him with guilt letters when he tells his mother he doesn't want her to chaperone the school trip to Hershey Park. Meanwhile, after attending Career Night, Geoff realizes he doesn't want to be an eye doctor.

programme.title: Mom: Fish Town and Too Many Thank You's
programme.desc: Bonnie is suspicious when her brother, Ray returns from rehab and strikes up a friendship with Adam. Christy and Bonnie have a brush with the law when they take Ray's car for a joy ride.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Jodi Miller, and Pauly Shore.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Baby and Other Things
programme.desc: Caroline and Bobby head for a fight when she encourages his sister to quit her job.

programme.title: Mom: Jail Jail and Japanese Porn
programme.desc: When Christy puts her new relationship ahead of friends and family, Bonnie has to pick up the slack.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Call Ended/ My Ex Is No Contractor
programme.desc: A vacation prize is lost; a contractor breaks an antique sink.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Taxi Craze/ Hoarders Beware
programme.desc: Unauthorized use of taxi leads to damage; property damage during professional cleaning.

programme.title: Protection Court: Believing Evidence
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Invasion of the Landlord/ Food Truck Driveway
programme.desc: Landlord sues tenant for defamation; a dispute over the location of a food truck.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Jones vs. Mornoes/ Smith
programme.desc: A Loveland, CO woman wants to know who is her child’s father.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Matthews vs. Moore
programme.desc: A Cleveland, OH woman wants to prove to her ex that he is the biological father of her daughter and not guys from her partying days.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: In a dispute over $1900, the plaintiff says it was for a trip to take with the defendant while the defendants says it was for her to use as she chose. Tenants are sued for hoarding pets which caused damages; the defendants say it was the prior tenants.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman agreed to pay for her granddaughter’s furniture to be delivered, but she claims her granddaughter tricked her into paying for the actual furniture, so she reported her to the police and she’s in court suing her for fraud.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Making a Mom In Law Mad' and 'Plowing Into a Guy.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'A Wheelie Bad Job' and 'Causing Tenant Troubles.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Here's My Keys/ Take Me Out of the Ball Game
programme.desc: A man sues a parking valet after his keys are lost; a mother blames a baseball coach for her bullied son’s injuries.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: William says his uncle Kwame let him live with him free of charge, but tortured him with a snake and stole $1000 from him. Kwame says his nephew is an entitled, lazy rich kid who ruined his home-based business, and he owes him nothing.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: Outragous Results
programme.desc: Cornell has doubts that his son with Raleesha is actually his child. Then, Stephanie's mom claims that her cousin Shawna could be her half-sister, but Stephanie's father denies the possibility altogether.

programme.title: Maury: You Got My Teen Pregnant, Stop Denying Her Baby!
programme.desc: Alexis says she saw the father of her children, Jorge on the Maury one show one day! He was denying another woman’s baby and his denials turned out to be true. However, Alexis claims that her story will have a different outcome.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: All Fingers Point to Cheating
programme.desc: Jake shares a room with his girlfriend Nicole and two others; when Nicole ignored his advances, he found comfort with Sidney. Mikayla wants to work things out with Jarred, but he's engaged to another woman. Kay says her sister Lexi cheated with her man.

programme.title: Maury: Did My Husband Have a Secret Love Child With My Best Friend?
programme.desc: Lexii and Dewayne return, as she's convinced that her husband is cheating. It's possible that Lexii’s best friend Deshay had an affair with him and that her child is actually Dewayne's. Anna believes Rico's work trips are laced with infidelity.

programme.title: Longhorn Film Showcase
